en: That is not how a chicken sounds. Chickens don't clack!
ja: それはニワトリの鳴き方じゃないよ。
vi: Do khong phai la tieng ga keu nhu vay.

en: You know what's risky? Letting your son go on that church thing.
ja: 息子をあの教会のイベントに行かせることだよ。
zhTW: 讓你兒子去參加那個教會活動。
vi: De con trai ban di buoi le nha tho do.

en: Well, her name's Anne, Dad, and he's not going on her. Hey, pal, you alone?
ja: 彼女の名前はアンだよ、パパ。彼は彼女のところに行くわけじゃない。
zhTW: 她的名字叫安，爸爸，他不是要去追她。
vi: Co ay ten la Ann, bo a, va anh ay khong theo co ay.

en: Almost always, yeah. We need a name.
ja: ほとんどいつもね。うん。
vi: Gan nhu luon luon vay. Uh.

en: Maybe Operation Hot Mother. Let's try to top that.
vi: Co le la Chien dich Ba Me Nong Bong.

en: That's not true at all. Chi-cha! Chi-cha! Chi-cha! What is that? Is that a chicken?
vi: Do la gi? La ga a?

en: What's this? Michael's scared to ask out Sally.
ko: 아, 마이클이 샐리를 데이트 신청하는 게 무서운 거구나. 아니야, 그렇지 않아.
ja: 何これ？あ、マイケルはサリーをデートに誘うのが怖いんだ。
zhTW: 這是什麼？噢，麥可不敢約莎莉出去。
vi: Cai gi day? A, Michael so khong dam ren Sally di choi.

en: No, I'm not. This is priceless.
ja: いいや、違うよ。あ、これは最高だ。行け！
zhTW: 不，我才沒有。噢，這太精彩了。去！
vi: Khong, khong phai. A, thu vi qua. Di!

en: These aren't even birds. That's enough. There are people working here.
We could double date. You and Sally and me and Anne. Who?
Anne. Yes. Of course I know Anne.
I didn't mean who. I meant her.
That's a great idea. I love Anne. Great.
ja: 行け！それはいいアイデアだ。

en: Excuse me, ma'am. You were flying today, buddy.
ja: 今日は飛行機に乗っていましたね。
vi: Hom nay ban da bay phai khong?
